rect.style: stroke: none; fill-rule: evenodd; paint-order: fill; fill: url(#gradient-1-0); pointer-events: none;

path.style: stroke-width: 5px; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(255, 255, 255); fill: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.655);

ellipse.style: stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; fill: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); stroke-width: 4.5px; stroke: rgb(255, 255, 255);
